_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work with designers and developers throughout the design, development and testing process.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.436), DA-S-004 (DA, cosine: 0.435).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.545). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [design, designers, developers, development, process, testing] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.899, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.039 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 14 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Work with designers and developers throughout the design, development and testin" and "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.449 < STS 0.545 (gap -0.097). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [design, designers, developers] and [applicable, approaches, engineering] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [design, designers, developers, development, process, testing]. WIDAI terms: [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel].
